items.briefing:
Good news for Australian individuals — a recent report finds Australians face a lower cybercrime risk overall. However, that pressure is shifting onto small and medium businesses (SMBs), which are increasingly being targeted. Separately, a new study found most organisations have already experienced AI-related security incidents, a timely reminder as AI tools become more common in workplaces, including training organisations.

On the AI front, concerns have been raised about trust and safety in AI platforms, with researchers highlighting how AI systems can be manipulated. If your organisation uses AI tools, ensure staff only use approved platforms and report anything that seems unusual or unexpected.

**Tip:** Review which AI tools your staff are currently using and confirm they are organisation-approved.

featured.title: Most firms hit by AI security incidents, study finds
featured.quote: Most Australian organizations exposed to AI security breaches, requiring urgent defensive strategies.
